code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  mut b = 0
  mut found = false
  while i < n and not found
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      if v == 32 or v == 9 or v == 10 or v == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        b = v
        found = true
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  if found
    mut sign = 1
    if b == 45
      sign = -1
      i = i + 1
    else if b == 43
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut num = 0
    mut parsing = true
    while i < n and parsing
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(v)
        if v >= 48 and v <= 57
          num = num * 10 + (v - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          parsing = false
        end
      when None
        parsing = false
      end
    end
    sum = sum + sign * num
    count = count + 1
  end
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
